identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create top 1% designs by mixing disparate disciplines and breaking conventions.

project.name: Lynkr
project.description: Premium, mailbox-first rewards and intelligence platform.
project.aesthetic: CRED-style minimalism, Dark-first premium, confident typography, soft shadows.

grids.bento_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-bold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4 text-base font-medium border border-white/10 transition-all hover:border-white/20

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-3xl border border-white/5 shadow-2xl p-6 md:p-8 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.style: bg-secondary/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-xl h-12 px-4 text-lg placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds; use deep solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Avoid 'Inter' for headings; use 'Outfit' to maintain the premium tech feel.
Use 2-3x more padding than standard designs.
Dark mode is the default and primary experience.
All interactive elements must have a hover state that changes brightness or scale.
Do not use generic AI emojis.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the design using the provided JSON guidelines. Start by setting up the global CSS variables in index.css to match the palette. Then, customize the Tailwind config to add the fonts and colors. Build the components using Shadcn primitives but heavily customized with the classes provided in the 'components' section. Focus on the 'Bento' grid layout for the dashboard and the 'Tetris' grid for the landing page.
